caption: CPU Information
description: The CPU information object contains attributes describing central processing unit hardware.
name: cpu_info

cpu_architecture.description: The CPU architecture, normalized to the caption of the cpu_architecture_id value. In the case of Other, it is defined by the source.

cpu_architecture_id.description: The normalized identifier of the CPU architecture.

cpu_bits.description: The number of bits used by the CPU for memory addressing.

model.description: The model name of the CPU. For example: Intel Xeon Gold 6348, AMD EPYC 7763, or Apple M3 Max.

vendor_name.description: The name of the vendor of the CPU. For example: Intel, AMD, or Apple.
